org.springframework.data.repository.query.ValueExpressionDelegate

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.repository.core.support
Base classes to implement repositories for various data stores.
org.springframework.data.repository.query
Support classes to work with query methods.

    Description
    static ValueExpressionDelegate
    ValueExpressionDelegate.create()
    Creates a default ValueExpressionDelegate using the StandardEnvironment, a default ValueExpression and extension-less EvaluationContextProvider.
